category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Sega Model 3 arcade emulator; official GitHub README describes Supermodel as a Sega Model 3 arcade emulator.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository README uses Supermodel; source_facts.name is supermodel.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides overview, downloads, community notes, and build instructions; README says GitHub is the official releases page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/trzy/Supermodel; per instruction not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official Supermodel README lists emulator, OpenGL, SDL2, arcade, and Sega Model 3 context.
